title: Digimobs
description: Digimon, in Minecraft! Digimobs has been around since 2011, and has been slowly developing ever since. Digimobs aims to bring as much of the franchise to Minecraft as humanly possible
body:
[![Sponsored by Bisect Hosting!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/be440d97-f540-46c2-9d12-b99f6b2d7a26.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/digimobs)
Sponsored by Bisect Hosting! Bisect has always been my go-to for our official servers. Whether you're creating content for fun or building a brand, BisectHosting is the hosting provider you can trust. And with our exclusive promo code, you can get the hosting you need at a discounted price. Use code **digimobs** to get 25% off in your first month for new customers. 

Keep up to date with everything going on with the mod through our Discord!
[![discord link](https://discord.com/api/guilds/363879447348117505/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/kksNFNrDxK)

LEARN THE BASICS -

With a series of quests that guides you through early game controls!

 ![Tutorial Quests!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d143daca6b8db81333c4ffef9ac5db6c6c303d9.png)

CHOOSE YOUR PARTNER -

Or let it choose you, with a series of questions designed to pick your partner!

![Choose your starter!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de446543b3e1e67f1b730f212cba4839dcc88e4.png)

RECRUIT OTHERS-

Tame your favorite digimon and add them to your group!

![Hiyarimon waiting to be tamed!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce58c93604f8472815d25c2f3b2b740475201b6.png)

GOTTA SCAN 'EM ALL -

Fill out your Field Guide with over 700 Digimon and counting to discover!

![Partially filled in Field Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09a8b115c2b4fa822c5f2dc5383bbb7701bfb967.png)

DIGIVOLVE -

Take your Digimon to the next level, or unlock alternate routes under the right conditions!

![BlackAgumon with multiple evolution routes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33f1bf56ad20b712d9ee0e8b3c26d6eff0ff4156.png)

BATTLE, MATCH, AND TRADE -

Battle with your digimon against wild digimon, or against other players in PVP mode!

![Air Battle! Goddramon vs Phoenixmon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7c45ab279d6f34ec468ca31137c65ea105aea02.png)

Breed new digimon and unlock new(or strange) combinations through Digimon Matching!

![Mistakes were made??](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71b18eacb0892ce7c60a991433ad77e5a6c36ad.png)

 PLAY WITH YOUR PREFERENCE -

Choose between using our HD formatted models, or in Dot Mode!

![Sprite forms! For performance(or for fun!)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a61cf34f8722153f26644128ac650a743867ecc2.png)

You DO NOT have permission to reuse assets from this mod for your projects unless specific permission is given by contributors before hand. That means that:
You CAN NOT rip models or textures without consent from the member that made it.

You CAN NOT rip item or block textures without consent from the original author that made it.

You CAN NOT redistribute the code for the mod under any circumstances. It is closed source and I do not intend to change that.

Many people have contributed countless hours to this mod, and I do not intend to see any of their work being stolen out of laziness. I take this seriously and will protect the members of my team should their hard work be stolen without consent in whatever escalation that may be necessary.
